retry_reason: Failure (-EBUSY) means all context slots are in use; retrying without freeing a slot will continue to fail.
contract_summary: Allocate a context slot and initialize its kref refcount to 1 via hfi1_rcd_init. On success, the caller receives a valid index and ownership of the context (rcd) with one reference. The caller must later release the reference by calling the appropriate put function. If no slot is available, the function returns -EBUSY and does not initialize any object.
